sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIME '10:30:00.123' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC');
UPDATE events SET event_time = TIME '14:15:00.456' AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'America/New_York' FROM events WHERE event_time > TIME '12:00:00' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
DELETE FROM events WHERE event_time < TIME '08:00:00' AT TIME ZONE 'UTC';
